opportunity.title: NSF America's Seed Fund: Advanced Manufacturing
opportunity.summary: NSF America's Seed Fund topic lane for small businesses developing advanced manufacturing processes, materials, minerals, additive manufacturing, 3D printing, and commercialization-ready deep technology.
opportunity.eligibility: U.S. small businesses may apply for Phase I and Phase II seed funding.

opportunity.title: NASA SBIR 2026 Hydrazine-Compatible Elastomeric Materials
opportunity.summary: NASA SBIR topic for chemically resistant elastomeric and polymer materials compatible with hydrazine and spaceflight systems. Relevant to rugged resin and aerospace materials R&D.
opportunity.eligibility: Small businesses may apply through NASA SBIR/STTR topic solicitations.

opportunity.title: NSF America's Seed Fund: Photonics
opportunity.summary: NSF America's Seed Fund topic lane for photonic materials, photonic metamaterials, optical components, lighting, displays, and other photonics technologies developed by startups.
opportunity.eligibility: U.S. small businesses may apply for Phase I and Phase II seed funding.

opportunity.title: NSF America's Seed Fund: Chemical Technologies
opportunity.summary: NSF America's Seed Fund topic lane for chemical technologies, green chemicals, chemical alternatives, advanced chemicals, sustainable chemistry, and advanced materials.
opportunity.eligibility: U.S. small businesses may apply for Phase I and Phase II seed funding.

opportunity.title: NASA SBIR 2026 Waterproofing Coatings or Surface Treatments for Reusable TPS
opportunity.summary: NASA SBIR topic for modern coating and surface-treatment chemistries that improve durability and reduce toxic materials for reusable thermal-protection systems.
opportunity.eligibility: Small businesses may apply through NASA SBIR/STTR topic solicitations.

opportunity.title: Early Stage Testing of Pharmacologic or Neuromodulatory Interventions for Mental Disorders (R61/R33)
opportunity.summary: NIH R61/R33 funding for early-stage testing of pharmacologic or neuromodulatory interventions for mental disorders, target engagement, clinical trials, fMRI, EEG, and psychiatric mechanisms.
opportunity.eligibility: Academic research institutions and clinical investigators may apply for mental-health intervention studies.

opportunity.title: First in Human and Early Stage Clinical Trials of Novel Investigational Drugs or Neuromodulatory Device-based Interventions for Psychiatric Disorders (U01 Clinical Trial Required)
opportunity.summary: NIH U01 funding for first-in-human and early-stage clinical trials of novel investigational drugs or neuromodulatory device-based interventions for psychiatric disorders, CNS target engagement, clinical neuroscience, and psychiatric disorders.
opportunity.eligibility: Academic research institutions and clinical investigators may apply for early-stage psychiatric drug trials.

opportunity.title: NIH highlighted topic: mechanism-driven psilocybin research
opportunity.summary: NIH highlighted topic expressing interest in mechanism-driven psilocybin research, biomarkers, safety, dose timing, translational research, psychedelic pharmacology, and psychiatric conditions.
opportunity.eligibility: Academic investigators should map the highlighted topic to a matching NIH funding mechanism.

opportunity.title: Generic Small Business Innovation Research Phase I
opportunity.summary: Generic forecasted small business innovation research program with no specific domain evidence.

opportunity.title: Army behavioral and social sciences broad agency announcement
opportunity.sponsor: Dept of the Army -- Materiel Command
opportunity.summary: Basic and applied research in behavioral and social sciences.
opportunity.eligibility: Universities and research organizations may apply.
